classificationRules.anchor: left if centerX <= 0.45, right if centerX >= 0.55, otherwise center
classificationRules.backgroundKind: purple when sampled purple background pixels dominate sampled white pixels; otherwise white
classificationRules.signature: line count plus each line row band, anchor, width bucket, background kind, and text kind
